creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text: Is it possible that there is no newline after OPTIONS_SET+= GSSAPI_NONE in your make.conf? If so, that file is not a valid POSIX text file (cf. https://stackoverflow.com/questions/729692/why-should-text-files-end-with-a-newline) and poudriere could quite easily be having trouble processing it.
